debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
i j : ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hi : i ∈ u
hj : j ∈ u
⊢ map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P

proof:
by
    have hmi : Measurable (fun (s : Set ι) ↦ i ∈ s) := by fun_prop
    have hmj : Measurable (fun (s : Set ι) ↦ j ∈ s) := by fun_prop
    have hmf : Measurable (fun (p : ι → Prop) ↦ {i | p i}) := by fun_prop
    change map ((fun s ↦ i ∈ s) ∘ X) P = map ((fun s ↦ j ∈ s) ∘ X) P
    rw [← hmi.aemeasurable.map_map_of_aemeasurable hX.aemeasurable,
        ← hmj.aemeasurable.map_map_of_aemeasurable hX.aemeasurable,
        hX.map_eq, bernoulliOn_eq_map,
        map_map hmi hmf, map_map hmj hmf]
    simp only [Function.comp_def, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    rw [infinitePi_map_eval, infinitePi_map_eval]
    simp [eq_true hi, eq_true hj]
successful_attempts:
by
    have hmi : Measurable (fun (s : Set ι) ↦ i ∈ s) := by fun_prop
    have hmj : Measurable (fun (s : Set ι) ↦ j ∈ s) := by fun_prop
    have hmf : Measurable (fun (p : ι → Prop) ↦ {i | p i}) := by fun_prop
    change map ((fun s ↦ i ∈ s) ∘ X) P = map ((fun s ↦ j ∈ s) ∘ X) P
    rw [← hmi.aemeasurable.map_map_of_aemeasurable hX.aemeasurable,
        ← hmj.aemeasurable.map_map_of_aemeasurable hX.aemeasurable,
        hX.map_eq, bernoulliOn_eq_map,
        map_map hmi hmf, map_map hmj hmf]
    simp only [Function.comp_def, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    rw [infinitePi_map_eval, infinitePi_map_eval]
    simp [eq_true hi, eq_true hj]
